hero.title: Modern and transparent public communication
hero.subtitle: Integrated platform for press relations, event management, citizen services, and social media.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Every action logged with full audit trail. Public communication that is accessible and traceable.

agility.title: Agility
agility.desc: Publish press releases, schedule events, and manage media contacts in a single platform.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Role-based access control, secure authentication, and sensitive data protection.

integration.title: Integration
integration.desc: Interconnected modules. Press releases become posts, events generate appointments automatically.

modules.title: Platform modules
modules.pressReleases: Create, approve, and publish official statements with a complete approval workflow.
modules.mediaContacts: Manage your database of journalists, outlets, and beats for efficient distribution.
modules.clippings: Monitor and catalog published media coverage with sentiment analysis.
modules.events: Organize press conferences, inaugurations, and public events with schedule control.
modules.appointments: Allow citizens to book in-person appointments with the office.
modules.citizenPortal: Unified citizen registry for personalized service.
modules.socialMedia: Plan, schedule, and publish content on institutional social media.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your communication?
cta.desc: Start using Secom for free and transform your public office communication.

footer.tagline: Communication management for government offices and agencies.

lgpd.message: This site uses essential cookies for platform operation, in compliance with the LGPD.

collection.title: 1. Data Collection
collection.desc: We collect personal data necessary for providing platform services, including name, email, CPF, and phone number. Collection is carried out in accordance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD — Law No. 13,709/2018).

usage.title: 2. Data Usage
usage.desc: Collected data is used exclusively for platform operation, user communication, appointment scheduling, and internal reporting. We do not share personal data with third parties without consent.

storage.title: 3. Storage and Security
storage.desc: Data is stored on secure servers with encryption in transit and at rest. Access is restricted to authorized users according to the platform's role-based access control.

rights.title: 4. Data Subject Rights
rights.desc: Under the LGPD, you have the right to access, correct, delete, and port your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact the data protection officer through the channel indicated below.

contact.title: 5. Contact
contact.desc: For questions about privacy and data protection, contact the Office of Public Relations through the institutional email.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.desc: By accessing and using the Secom platform, you agree to these terms of use. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.

usage.title: 2. Platform Usage
usage.desc: The platform is intended for institutional use by the Office of Public Relations and its authorized collaborators. Access is personal and non-transferable.

obligations.title: 3. User Obligations
obligations.desc: Users must keep their credentials confidential, use the platform ethically and in compliance with applicable legislation, and not attempt to access unauthorized data or features.

liability.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
liability.desc: The platform is provided as-is. We are not responsible for temporary unavailability, data loss resulting from misuse, or user connection failures.

changes.title: 5. Changes to Terms
changes.desc: These terms may be updated at any time. Significant changes will be communicated to users through the platform.
